title: Orc doubles damage when attack die is 6

card.rawText: Inflict 2x Atk damage with this creature if 1 of your Atk Dice Rolls is a 6.

plan.title: Orc doubles damage when attack die is 6
plan.summary: Verify Orc attack damage is multiplied by 2 when any Atk damage die result is 6.

notes: Orc attack damage formula should be die 6 + modifier 2 = 8, then doubled to 16 unless engine doubles final attack damage.

steps: Put Orc as player_1 primary and Hafling as player_2 primary.
Observe conditional multiplier and final damage.

expectedAssertions.label: Conditional multiplier trace exists
expectedAssertions.value: At least 1 Atk Dice Roll is 6

manualVerification: Repeat with damage die 5 and verify final damage is 7 with no multiplier.
riskNotes: If critical-hit rules also trigger from attack dice all 6s, confirm engine separates attack-die condition from hit-roll criticals.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported pipeline; requires individual attack dice access.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
